title: lasthenia macrantha
intro: Lasthenia macrantha, also known as mountain gold, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lasthenia macrantha are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for a range of health concerns.
